name: Parties to Guarantee
title: Parties and Recitals
text: This Guarantee Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} by and among {{party_1_descriptor}} (the "Creditor"), {{party_2_descriptor}} (the "Principal Debtor"), and {{guarantor_descriptor}} (the "Guarantor") (collectively, the "Parties"). WHEREAS, the Creditor has agreed to extend or continue financial accommodation to the Principal Debtor on the faith of this Guarantee; AND WHEREAS, the Guarantor has agreed to guarantee the due performance and payment obligations of the Principal Debtor in relation to the underlying financial accommodation. NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and promises contained herein, the Parties agree as follows:
invalid_if: The identity of the creditor, principal debtor, or guarantor is omitted
The recital does not connect the guarantee to an underlying financial accommodation
dispute_hotspots: Guarantor identity — guarantor claims he signed in personal capacity vs corporate capacity
Authority — guarantor company director lacks board authority to issue guarantee
Stamp duty on guarantee agreement — must be adequately stamped
